title: TS6 8JH , PEAK TECHNOLOGY METALS LIMITED: permit surrender issued -EPR/YP3938JL/S002
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter for:    Operator name: PEAK TECHNOLOGY METALS LIMITED   Installation name: Wilton Mineral Processing and Refining Facility   Permit number: EPR/YP3938JL/S002   "
